speaker: speaker1
text: Sorry . I didn't mean to be late . Can I come in ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Have I used the one that my sister is sick ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Are you sure ? I thought I said it was my mother .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't think so . But it could've been .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well . You can trust me this time . My sister is definitely sick . I'm just coming from the hospital . They say she might even die .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't buy your story . Try not to have any more sick relatives this week , all right ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Just try to be a little more punctual in the future .
